final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for the "RAN QIU" brand.

Style/medium: needs an "东方美学" (Eastern aesthetic) with minimalist, natural-poetic, warm-healing direction — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs generous negative space and shallow depth of field — exact framing is yours
Subject: must include the "RAN QIU" brand mark
Scene/backdrop: needs a warm autumn atmosphere with natural elements — exact setting is yours
Lighting/mood: needs golden-hour warm lighting with a poetic, tranquil atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must include #8B3A1E (deep autumn brown-red), #E8DCCB (beige), #D4A574 (golden brown)
Materials/textures: needs warm-toned surface treatment — exact grain / sheen is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "RAN QIU"
Constraints: must preserve brand color accuracy (#8B3A1E / #E8DCCB / #D4A574), must maintain generous negative space
Avoid:
